# SeenBy — Client Onboarding Questionnaire

> Send this to the client after the contract is signed and the first invoice is paid.  
> Complete this before running the baseline scan.

---

## Section 1 — Brand Information

1. **Official brand name** (exactly as it should appear in AI queries):  
   `____________________________________`

2. **Brand name variations** (abbreviations, common misspellings, former names):  
   `____________________________________`

3. **Website URL:**  
   `____________________________________`

4. **Industry / category** (e.g. "Malaysian dental clinic", "B2B SaaS — HR software", "boutique hotel KL"):  
   `____________________________________`

5. **Primary service or product** (one sentence):  
   `____________________________________`

6. **Target market** (geography + customer type):  
   - Primary city/region: `________________`
   - Customer type (B2B / B2C / both): `________________`
   - Industry of your customers (if B2B): `________________`

7. **Languages to scan in:**  
   ☐ English (default)  ☐ Bahasa Malaysia  ☐ Both

---

## Section 2 — Competitors

List up to 5 direct competitors. We track how often AI recommends them vs. you.

| # | Competitor Brand Name | Website | Why they're a competitor |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | | | |
| 2 | | | |
| 3 | | | |
| 4 | | | |
| 5 | | | |

> Leave rows blank if you have fewer than 5 competitors.

---

## Section 3 — AI Platforms

Which AI platforms do you want us to monitor? (Check all that apply — minimum 1)

☐ **ChatGPT** (OpenAI)  
☐ **Perplexity AI**  
☐ **Google Gemini**  
☐ **Claude** (Anthropic)  

> Recommendation: Enable all 4 for the most complete picture. Starter tier covers 2.

---

## Section 4 — Scan Focus Areas

Which query types are most important to your business? (Rank 1–4 or leave equal)

| Query Category | Example | Priority (1 = most important) |
|---|---|---|
| Brand queries | "Tell me about [Your Brand]" | |
| Comparison queries | "[Your Brand] vs [Competitor]" | |
| Recommendation queries | "Best [your service] in Malaysia" | |
| Local queries | "Best [your service] in KL / Penang" | |

---

## Section 5 — Report Delivery

1. **Primary contact name for reports:**  
   `____________________________________`

2. **Email address for weekly digests & monthly reports:**  
   `____________________________________`

3. **Secondary email (CC) if applicable:**  
   `____________________________________`

4. **Preferred report delivery day:** (e.g. "first Monday of the month")  
   `____________________________________`

---

## Section 6 — AI Readiness Toolkit (Growth & Authority tiers)

If your plan includes the AI Readiness Toolkit, we'll generate files for your website:

1. **Do you have an existing `robots.txt` on your site?** ☐ Yes  ☐ No  ☐ Not sure

2. **Do you have existing schema markup?** ☐ Yes  ☐ No  ☐ Not sure

3. **Who manages your website / can upload files to your server root?**  
   Name: `____________________` Contact: `____________________`

4. **CMS platform** (WordPress, Webflow, Shopify, custom, etc.):  
   `____________________________________`

---

## Section 7 — Context for Better Scans

Help us write better queries. The more specific, the better your baseline.

1. **What is the #1 thing you want AI to say about your brand?**  
   (e.g. "We're the most trusted accounting firm in Petaling Jaya")  
   `____________________________________`

2. **What question do your customers most commonly ask when searching for your service?**  
   `____________________________________`

3. **Any topics, queries, or competitor comparisons you specifically want us to test?**  
   `____________________________________`

4. **Anything AI currently says about you that is wrong or harmful?**  
   `____________________________________`

---

## Section 8 — Client View Link (Growth & Authority tiers)

We can generate a read-only link for you to view your live dashboard.

1. **Do you want a client view link?** ☐ Yes  ☐ No

2. **Who should have access to this link?** (Name / role)  
   `____________________________________`

3. **Should we disable the link after your contract ends?** ☐ Yes (default)  ☐ No

---

## Internal Checklist (Faris — complete before first scan)

- [ ] Client added to admin panel (`/clients` → new)
- [ ] Brand, competitors, platforms configured in settings
- [ ] Scan categories confirmed
- [ ] Baseline scan triggered
- [ ] Assisted scores (Brand Authority + Content Quality) reviewed & gated
- [ ] AI Readiness Toolkit generated (if applicable)
- [ ] Welcome email sent with toolkit files + what to expect
- [ ] Client view link sent (if applicable)
- [ ] First invoice confirmed paid
